text_preview:
Chapter 1: The Beginning

It was a dark and stormy night. The rain beat against the windows of the old mansion on the hill. Inside, a group of strangers gathered around the fireplace, each with their own secrets.

Sarah, the young governess, sat quietly in the corner reading a book. She had arrived only yesterday to care for the two orphaned children who lived in this isolated house.

Mr. Blackwood, the mysterious owner of the mansion, paced back and forth. He was a tall man with dark hair and p...

metadata.summary: On a stormy night, a group of strangers gathers in an isolated mansion, each hiding their own secrets. As the group discusses their presence, a sudden thunderclap causes a blackout, leaving them in darkness.
key_scenes: Sarah reading quietly while Mr. Blackwood paces the room.
Dr. Chen expresses regret about their presence in the mansion.
Thunder shakes the house and the lights go out.
